description_long: This object is a vintage-style gasoline pump, predominantly orange with blue accents and a rounded top. The front features a circular illuminated sign labeled 'GASOLINE', a mechanical display for fuel measurement, and a rectangular panel with buttons or indicators. Two black fuel hoses with nozzles are attached on either side, hanging down and looping outward. The pump stands on a concrete base, which shows some weathering and discoloration. The sides are relatively plain, with recessed panels and the hoses visible, while the back is solid orange with minimal detailing. The overall design is reminiscent of mid-20th-century gas pumps, with a robust, metallic construction and retro aesthetic.
description: A vintage orange and blue gasoline pump with a round illuminated sign, mechanical display, and dual black fuel hoses. The design is robust and retro, evoking classic mid-century gas stations.
description_view_0: Front view shows the circular 'GASOLINE' sign, mechanical display, control panel, and both fuel hoses with nozzles clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the pump's depth, the side panel, and the profile of the round sign, with one hose visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a solid orange back with minimal features, both hoses visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side panel, hose, and the round sign's profile.
attribute_fuel_pumps: One vintage-style fuel pump with two black hoses and nozzles, orange and blue color scheme, mechanical display, and a round illuminated sign on top. No digital screens are visible.
attribute_station_signage: A round illuminated sign on top of the pump with the word 'GASOLINE' in multicolored letters. No other signage is visible.
